name: 慈濟的故事(臺北的第二個家 、感念臺北因緣 、講藥師經結緣)

extensions.name: 愛善傳承締祥和
notes: Adjusted the conclusion to emphasize the longstanding bond between the Master and Lin's mother, framing the story as an example of members of the Dharma family caring for one another.
Remember to include the closing phrase "Let's take a listen" at the end.

extensions.name: 愛滿地慈少畢典
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 愛滿地慈少畢典 2:12

extensions.name: 守護花東聚善能
notes: Added background information identifying Dr. Hsu Ren-jun as director of the Cancer Center at Hualien Tzu Chi Hospital.

extensions.name: 賴索托冬令
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 賴索托冬令 2:11 (請寫完小編文再開始做)

extensions.name: 瓜照顧戶複查
extensions.sourceText: Alex Chen: 瓜照顧戶複查 0:42

notes: Number selected images when more than one image is included.
Expanded the opening with more context and placed non-spoken introductory wording in parentheses.
Looked up prior Humanistic Bodhi materials to understand the event background before translating this Tzu Chi history segment.
Gave Lee Shih-hsien a clearer first introduction and used "my Master" with a capital M for the speaker's teacher.
Restored the idea that Lee Shih-hsien was determined to follow the Master on the Bodhisattva Path.
Flagged the Hualien forest office wording as a note or source detail that should be labeled clearly or removed.
Avoided calling Mr. Zheng director of Hualien's Forest District Office because the exact early Hualien forestry unit may be more specific.
Reworked 克難 to describe Tzu Chi's early lack of resources more concretely instead of using the abstract phrase "Tzu Chi's hardships."
Clarified the phone-call anecdote so the volunteer, the Master, the volunteer's father, and the Master's mother are not confused.
Changed the telephone wording from donating a phone to installing one because the next lines discuss utility poles and phone lines.
Numbered selected images and reconsidered the first image because its connection to the title, summary, and content was not clear.
Added parentheses around the opening bridge because the first sentence is a good contextual introduction rather than directly spoken content.
Consolidated repeated source citations and kept the supporting reference material together instead of splitting one source across several entries.
Added clearer Huayen Lotus Society sourcing and used Venerable for Venerable Nan Ting.
Made 道場 terminology more consistent and clarified the first mention of the seventh-floor space.
Reworked Lee Qing-po's offer so the English does not awkwardly follow the Chinese "No."
Replaced "joking" with wording that presents the Master as sharing the story in a lighter tone.
Clarified the transition so Lee Qing-po and Hu Yu-zhu are not confused as the first person who drove the Master.
Corrected the romanization of Hu Yu-zhu's name.
Reworked the Medicine Buddha Sutra passage to refer to talks during the hospital-building period and to use "talks" instead of "lectures."
Removed the extra space after the question in the Chinese summary.
Numbered selected images and avoided using an AI-edited historical photo that changed the color of the Master's robe.
Improved line breaks so the slow narration around the seventh-floor window and lecture hall entrance reads more naturally.
Restored the idea that the Buddha-Dharma should be shared in this world and avoided the unclear phrase "the people living here."
Replaced "these senior Tzu Chi leaders" with wording about senior volunteers who took on leadership responsibilities.
Added a comma after "during that time."
Clarified that the Medicine Buddha Sutra text refers to the Master's collected talks from different periods, not all commentaries.
Reworked the summaries so the hospital-building context is introduced before mentioning eastern Taiwan medical care.
sourceText: Alex Chen接下來請Alex翻譯 慈濟的故事(臺北的第二個家 、感念臺北因緣 、講藥師經結緣)，長24分48秒，預計做19小時51分，由6/12（五）15:00起算，deadline為6/17(三) 9:51，謝謝。

name: 3集日日有新知 (如何讓蘋果更耐旱＋現代人都驚嘆的2500年前宇宙觀＋少睡多讀成績好?)
notes: Added the speaker's self-introduction because there is sufficient subtitle time here and recurring speakers in this series can often be identified from earlier episodes.
Replaced "stars" with a more general term because the speaker is using 星星 loosely here and the examples include planets, which are not actually stars.
Softened the phrasing about our worries to reflect the speaker's positive intent of making them feel lighter rather than implying our lives or actions are unimportant.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯3集日日有新知，預計做7小時12分鐘，從6/18(四) 08:41開始算，deadline為6/18 (四)16:53，謝謝~

name: 心靈講座(在不確定中走出確定 - 童子賢) 4 個短版

extensions.name: 聞法造福淨心靈
notes: Added a time marker so the introduction could bring in Tzu Chi volunteers from Central and South America more smoothly and broaden the overall scope.

extensions.name: 弘揚佛法共成就
notes: Added the date because Dharma tour pieces are published quickly and participating Tzu Chi volunteers may be eager to see them soon after the event.
Reworked the introduction to specify that this talk was for the Taipei Buddha Bathing Ceremony team and to credit different volunteer groups in a style closer to the Chinese introduction.
Replaced "I never socialize" with wording about avoiding business social events so 不應酬 does not imply avoiding social interaction in general.
Reworked the sentence structure to restore the specific examples of meeting clients, talking to vendors, and checking construction without making the subtitles feel too rushed.
sourceText: 請 Alex Chen 翻譯 心靈講座(在不確定中走出確定 - 童子賢) 4 個短版, 長度35分, 預計翻譯28時(3天4時), 從6/18（四）16:53起算, deadline 為6/25(四)11:53, 謝謝！

notes: Reworked the introduction and summary to more closely reflect the episode's spoken content.
